name: Harlan Ellison - SDMI / The Acrebis Mythos
description:
📚 || 🌩️ 🎵 Major Tom (Coming Home)

The last thing you expected in your backyard was for an alien to shake the entire island as he crash landed on your island home, let alone have the audacity to experience a near-death at your feet.

Author’s Note:

HE’S FINALLY DONE! The 50 Follower Special is posted at last!

I didn’t realize that I was cooking until I looked at the character count, and hoo boy, almost 12,000 characters in one prompt alone is a feat comparable to that of the Seven Wonders of the World. And the best part: you finally get a good look at what he actually looks like underneath the cloaking device mentioned in Space Cowboys! I got my shit together and actually drew the thing!


TAGS: Harlan Ellison, SDMI, Keplerian, Alien Char, crash-landed, major tom (coming home), yes this also might be an excuse to shill my music stuff, open ended, he’s just a lil’ fish dude far from the mud hole
creator: modernPsych0
